description: PointlesSQL audit + lineage dashboard. Reads the metadata SQLite DB directly. Sprint 19.0 quick-win (no Phase 18 audit-API dependency).

options.content:
# PointlesSQL Audit

Reads `/data/pointlessql/pointlessql.db` (SQLite) directly. Postgres deployments: see Sprint 19.0.1.  
Panels cover Phase 14 (cost-gate, external writes) + Phase 15.x (rejects, value changes) + Phase 13.11 (tool calls). No agent code, no API — just the audit tables.

panels.title: Datasource health (agent_runs row count)
panels.description: Smoke test — if this shows 'No data' the SQLite mount is wrong, not the dashboard.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) AS runs FROM agent_runs
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) AS runs FROM agent_runs

panels.title: External writes (unack)
panels.description: Unattributed Delta commits (writes that bypassed PQL). Alert ≥1.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) AS unack FROM unattributed_writes WHERE acknowledged_at IS NULL
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) AS unack FROM unattributed_writes WHERE acknowledged_at IS NULL

panels.title: Cost-gate denials per day
panels.description: Runs blocked by the EXPLAIN-cost gate (Phase 14). status='denied' AND cost_gate_trigger NOT NULL.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT date(started_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS denials FROM agent_runs WHERE status='denied' AND cost_gate_trigger IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(started_at) GROUP BY date(started_at) ORDER BY 1
targets.queryText: SELECT date(started_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS denials FROM agent_runs WHERE status='denied' AND cost_gate_trigger IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(started_at) GROUP BY date(started_at) ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Runs per day
panels.description: All agent_runs grouped by start date, regardless of status.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT date(started_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS runs FROM agent_runs WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) GROUP BY date(started_at) ORDER BY 1
targets.queryText: SELECT date(started_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS runs FROM agent_runs WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) GROUP BY date(started_at) ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Reject-rate vs 7-day baseline
panels.description: Daily rejects (lineage_row_rejects) plus a 7-day trailing average baseline. Spikes above baseline warrant a look.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT date(created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS rejects FROM lineage_row_rejects WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY date(created_at) ORDER BY 1
targets.queryText: SELECT date(created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS rejects FROM lineage_row_rejects WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY date(created_at) ORDER BY 1

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT d.day AS time, (SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) / 7.0 FROM lineage_row_rejects r WHERE date(r.created_at) > date(d.day, '-7 days') AND date(r.created_at) <= date(d.day)) AS baseline_7d_avg FROM (SELECT DISTINCT date(created_at) AS day FROM lineage_row_rejects WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)) d ORDER BY 1
targets.queryText: SELECT d.day AS time, (SELECT CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) / 7.0 FROM lineage_row_rejects r WHERE date(r.created_at) > date(d.day, '-7 days') AND date(r.created_at) <= date(d.day)) AS baseline_7d_avg FROM (SELECT DISTINCT date(created_at) AS day FROM lineage_row_rejects WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at)) d ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Value-change volume per table
panels.description: lineage_value_changes grouped by target_table per day. Threshold ≥1000/day per table flagged red.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT date(created_at) AS time, target_table, COUNT(*) AS changes FROM lineage_value_changes WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY date(created_at), target_table ORDER BY 1
targets.queryText: SELECT date(created_at) AS time, target_table, COUNT(*) AS changes FROM lineage_value_changes WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY date(created_at), target_table ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Top mutating principals (rows written)
panels.description: Sum of rows_affected for merge/write_table operations, grouped by principal.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(r.principal, '<unknown>') AS principal, COALESCE(SUM(o.rows_affected), 0) AS total_rows FROM agent_runs r JOIN agent_run_operations o ON o.agent_run_id = r.id WHERE o.op_name IN ('merge', 'write_table') AND $__timeFilter(r.started_at) GROUP BY r.principal ORDER BY total_rows DESC LIMIT 10
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(r.principal, '<unknown>') AS principal, COALESCE(SUM(o.rows_affected), 0) AS total_rows FROM agent_runs r JOIN agent_run_operations o ON o.agent_run_id = r.id WHERE o.op_name IN ('merge', 'write_table') AND $__timeFilter(r.started_at) GROUP BY r.principal ORDER BY total_rows DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Tool-call latency per tool (p50 / p99)
panels.description: Per-tool wall-clock latency from agent_run_tool_calls. Percentiles computed via Grafana 'Reduce → percentile' transform.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT tool_name, duration_ms FROM agent_run_tool_calls WHERE duration_ms IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(called_at)
targets.queryText: SELECT tool_name, duration_ms FROM agent_run_tool_calls WHERE duration_ms IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(called_at)

panels.title: EXPLAIN cost estimate (cost_est) histogram
panels.description: Distribution of Phase-14 cost-gate estimates across runs. Spike on the right tail = expensive runs about to hit the gate.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CAST(cost_est AS REAL) AS cost FROM agent_runs WHERE cost_est IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(started_at)
targets.queryText: SELECT CAST(cost_est AS REAL) AS cost FROM agent_runs WHERE cost_est IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(started_at)

title: PointlesSQL Audit
